growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: engqvist.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.medium: Sodium carbonate soda medium (pH ~10), thiosulfate as energy source

up.method: derived from mu_max and growth yield

growth_records.cite: Dimitry Y. Sorokin et al. The Microbial Sulfur Cycle at Extremely Haloalkaline Conditions of Soda Lakes. Frontiers in Microbiology (2011). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2011.00044. [PMC3128939]
growth_records.snippet: Maximal specific growth rate 0.08 h-1 ... Maximal growth yield with S2O3(2-) 5.8 mg protein mmol-1 ... pH optimum 10.0 ... microaerophile.
growth_records.notes: Review Table 2. mu_max=0.08 h-1; td=ln2/0.08=8.66 h. Yield 5.8 mg protein/mmol thiosulfate. Derived qS = 0.08/5.8 = 0.0138 mmol/(mg protein.h) = 13.8 mmol/(g protein.h) per g protein. Single validated species. Temperature not stated. Review-aggregated.
